title: mikania saltensis
intro: Mikania saltensis, also known as Saltbrush, is a perennial plant native to the salt desert shrublands of western North America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania saltensis include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Mikania saltensis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, or applied topically as a poultice or salve to promote wound healing.
